creator: sprice@hiwaay.net
text:
---------- Forwarded message ----------
Date: Mon, 16 Aug 1999 15:02:22 -0400
From: "Patrick Bihan-Faou (blackline)" <patrick@blackline.on.ca>
To: gnats-admin@FreeBSD.org, freebsd-ports@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/13170: new port: UW-Imap with maildir and qmail support

Hi,

I forgot a @dirrm directive in the PLIST for this port.

Here is the new PLIST file that should replace the one I submitted
yesterday.

Patrick.


bin/mboxtest
include/mail.h
include/rfc822.h
include/linkage.h
lib/lib%%SHLIBBASE%%.a
lib/%%SHLIBNAME%%
lib/lib%%SHLIBBASE%%.so
@exec /usr/bin/env OBJFORMAT=%%PORTOBJFORMAT%% /sbin/ldconfig -m %B
@unexec /usr/bin/env OBJFORMAT=%%PORTOBJFORMAT%% /sbin/ldconfig -R
libexec/imapd
libexec/ipop2d
libexec/ipop3d
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/BUILD
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/CONFIG
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/README.maildir
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/README.qmail
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/RELNOTES
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/bugs.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/calendar.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/drivers.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/formats.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/imaprc.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/internal.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/locking.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/md5.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/naming.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc1731.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc1732.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc1733.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc2060.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc2061.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc2062.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc2086.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc2087.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc2088.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc2177.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc2180.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc2192.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc2193.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc2195.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc2221.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc2222.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc2234.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc2245.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc2342.txt
share/doc/imap-uw-qmail/rfc/rfc2359.txt
@dirrm share/doc/imap-uw-qmail
